mapper.insert: INSERT INTO social_insurance_config ( emp_id, social_insurance_base, housing_fund_base, pension_personal, pension_company, medical_personal, medical_company, unemployment_personal, unemployment_company, injury_company, maternity_company, housing_fund_personal, housing_fund_company, remark ) VALUES ( #{empId}, #{socialInsuranceBase}, #{housingFundBase}, #{pensionPersonal}, #{pensionCompany}, #{medicalPersonal}, #{medicalCompany}, #{unemploymentPersonal}, #{unemploymentCompany}, #{injuryCompany}, #{maternityCompany}, #{housingFundPersonal}, #{housingFundCompany}, #{remark} )
